author: DominicVainMod
content:
@everyone

Star Atlas Community Week - Coming in February

A celebration of the award winning Star Atlas community is coming next month! 

Introducing Star Atlas Community Week, a five-day celebration of who makes everything possible – YOU!

Featuring:
Atlas Brew #100,COPA,Joni Awards,Big giveaways!,
Stay tuned tomorrow for the start of Joni Awards nominations and COPA DAC submissions!

 | Learn about the event: https://medium.com/star-atlas/star-atlas-community-week-a-galactic-celebration-cd0634b6c3fc
